SELECT
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'SME')
    -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM')
    -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
    -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM (
        SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment, c.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth ym
            JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
              AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
            GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
        )
        WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
        GROUP BY Segment
    ) WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_cons AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM seg_cons
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2013) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)
   OR pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
